12B (1)A company shall, within one month after Disclosure
another company has become related to it, lodge with the of
information
Commissioner-General a notice of that fact together with
particularsidentifyingthatcompany.
(2) Ifacompanyfailstocomplywiththissection,the
company, and each officer in default, commits an offence
and is liable, on conviction to a penalty not exceeding ten
thousandpenaltyunitsforeachdaythatthefailurecontinues.
